content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 28, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 28, 2026, focused on a significant infrastructure and dependency overhaul. The team initiated a stack of pull requests to modernize the framework, including updates to TypeScript 6, Node.js 24, and various core dependencies. Additionally, new features were proposed to enhance n8n integration, credential mediation, and agent runtime management.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Dependency Modernization and Cleanup**
*   Initiated updates for core environment dependencies, including Node.js to 24.15.0 ([#7148](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7148)), TypeScript to 6.0.3 ([#7151](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7151)), and Bun to 1.3.13 ([#7155](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7155)).
*   Updated secondary dependencies including Rollup ([#7149](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7149)), Rimraf ([#7150](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7150)), Capacitor ([#7147](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7147)), React ([#7156](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7156)), Python 3.14 ([#7157](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7157)), and Ruby 3.4.9 ([#7158](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7158)).
*   Removed deprecated plugins `@elizaos/plugin-todo` and `@elizaos/plugin-rolodex` ([#7154](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7154)).

**n8n and Agent Runtime Enhancements**
*   Proposed features to propagate conversation routing into workflow generators ([#7164](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7164)) and surface Discord/Gmail contexts ([#7163](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7163)).
*   Added a runtime operations manager and widget host refresh ([#7166](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7166)).
*   Implemented a credential mediation layer for agents ([#7167](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7167)) and improved n8n credential cache purging ([#7162](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7162)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#7167](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7167): Credential mediation layer (Phase 0).
*   [#7166](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7166): Runtime operations manager and widget host refresh.
*   [#7165](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7165): Clear stale Eliza Cloud auth on relink.
*   [#7164](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7164): Propagate conversation routing to n8n workflow generator.
*   [#7163](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7163): n8n runtime-context provider for Discord and Gmail.
*   [#7162](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7162): Purge n8n credential cache on disconnect.
*   [#7161](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7161): Deep-link banner for connector settings.
*   [#7160](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7160): Bundle build-monetized-app skill.
*   [#7159](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7159): Fix action formatting for non-string entries.
*   [#7158](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7158): Update Ruby to v3.4.9.
*   [#7157](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7157): Update Python to 3.14.
*   [#7156](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7156): Update React monorepo to v19.2.5.
*   [#7155](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7155): Update Bun to v1.3.13.
*   [#7154](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7154): Remove todo and rolodex plugins.
*   [#7153](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7153): Fix cloud provider switch model drift.
*   [#7152](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7152): Add CREATE_TASK to EXPLICIT_INTENT_ACTIONS.
*   [#7151](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7151): Bump TypeScript to ^6.0.3.
*   [#7150](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7150): Bump rimraf to 6.1.3.
*   [#7149](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7149): Bump rollup to 4.60.2.
*   [#7148](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7148): Bump Node.js to 24.15.0.
*   [#7147](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7147): Bump Capacitor dependencies.
*   [#7146](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7146): Pin `@elizaos/plugin-rolodex` to unblock `bun install`.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   [#79](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/79) (Dependency Dashboard): Development is currently gated by PR [#7146](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7146) to resolve a `bun install` failure caused by a missing transitive dependency version. Once merged, the team plans to rebase and merge the remaining dependency updates. Observations were noted regarding gaps in CI coverage and incorrect paths in the `generate:types` script.
